items.html: Thus there are now completed in her two hinges, two doors, and two MaNTzePaChs — that is, twenty-seven letters that she received by means of ZA [Zeir Anpin], and a second twenty-seven letters that she received by means of Bina. And when you join these two doors [two Dalets] like this: ם, they become the shape of the closed Mem, as in the verse "LeMarbeh of the government" [written with a closed Mem in the middle of the word] — for by means of the two doors her Yesod is closed up and becomes a closed Mem, with the newborn within her, made from the MAD [Mayin Duchrin] and MAN [Mayin Nukvin]. Then she is called "a garden locked… a spring sealed," for the MAN are closed and sealed within these doors, which are made into a closed Mem. And since these doors are the twenty-two letters there, from which the newborn takes form, the forming of the newborn's shape is not completed until forty days, for it takes form by the force of these two doors, which are the closed Mem.
